title: Cottages
description: This mods adds small cottage structures in forest for a more alive world.
body:
![Title Image](https://i.imgur.com/g2rHyzR.png)



This mod introduces charming, handcrafted cottages scattered throughout the Minecraft forests. These cozy dwellings serve as a unique addition to your exploration experience, offering safe havens, hidden loot, and aesthetic value. Each cottage seamlessly blends into the natural environment, waiting to be discovered by wandering explorers. Only found in forest biomes, these structures add an element of surprise and warmth to your gameplay, perfect for those who love the beauty of nature and a touch of homestead charm.

## Structures
- **Oak cottage**, spawns in normal forests and forested biomes
- **Spruce cottage**, generates in taiga forests
- **Snowy cottage**, only generates in cold biomes

## Planned features
- Generating different interiors
- Adding more extra side structures
- Adding more types and mod-dependent cottages
- Adding snowy extra sides
- Have an idea? Share it in an issue on GitHub!
